baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, legacy readonly daily-log builder
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs building the readonly daily-log output without cache reuse

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, warmed readonly daily-log cache
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs reading the readonly daily-log output after one cache-populating call, with mutation invalidation still enabled

environment.note: The cache only applies to the non-materializing readonly path; report mutation and daily-log sync explicitly clear the cached surface.
